output:
Here is a 7-day meal plan tailored to your requirements and preferences:

Day 1:
- Breakfast: Scrambled eggs with spinach and cherry tomatoes
- Lunch: Turkey and avocado wrap with gluten-free tortilla
- Dinner: Grilled chicken breast with sweet potato fries and steamed carrots

Day 2:
- Breakfast: Greek yogurt with mixed berries and gluten-free granola
- Lunch: Beef stir-fry with mixed vegetables (carrots, zucchini, capsicum)
- Dinner: Baked salmon with quinoa and roasted sweet potatoes

Day 3:
- Breakfast: Omelette with mushrooms, peppers, and dairy-free cheese
- Lunch: Chickpea salad with cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and lemon dressing
- Dinner: Beef tacos with corn tortillas, lettuce, and salsa

Day 4:
- Breakfast: Smoothie with banana, almond milk, and peanut butter
- Lunch: Thai green curry with chicken and jasmine rice
- Dinner: Lentil soup with gluten-free bread

Day 5:
- Breakfast: Chia pudding with almond milk and mixed berries
- Lunch: Grilled shrimp skewers with quinoa salad
- Dinner: Butter chicken with basmati rice and steamed broccoli

Day 6:
- Breakfast: Breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, black beans, and avocado
- Lunch: Turkey and vegetable soup with gluten-free crackers
- Dinner: Beef kebabs with roasted potatoes and green beans

Day 7:
- Breakfast: Smoothie bowl with mango, coconut milk, and gluten-free granola
- Lunch: Mexican rice bowl with black beans, corn, and avocado
- Dinner: Grilled lamb chops with roasted potatoes and asparagus

Remember to adjust portion sizes according to your specific dietary needs and goals. Enjoy your meals!
